title: Composable Kernel Custom Epilogue Visitor Scaffold

problem.summary: Create a task boundary for custom Composable Kernel epilogue visitors that fuse bias, activation, scaling, auxiliary outputs, or metadata writes after GEMM.
constraints: Template-only; compare against hipBLASLt epilogues and built-in Composable Kernel epilogues first
Record Composable Kernel commit, tile shapes, scheduler, epilogue tree, and workspace
Do not claim direct HIP kernel wins from an extension-only artifact

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or library oracle; compare all outputs across edge cases before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as a template-only task. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
